hero.headline: 27 Years of Backyard Transformations
hero.subheadline: From crystal-clear pools to custom outdoor kitchens, Mannix Pools & Grills has been Polk County's trusted outdoor living partner since 1999. Let B.J. and his crew handle it all so you can enjoy your backyard the way it was meant to be.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pools, Pavers, Kitchens & Grills —<br class="hidden md:block"> All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Why juggle multiple contractors when one trusted team handles everything outdoors? From weekly pool care to custom outdoor kitchens, we keep it simple.

cards.title: Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Professional weekly cleaning with chemicals included. Green pool? We'll restore it to crystal-clear condition fast. Your pool stays swim-ready every week.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Give your aging pool new life with updated finishes, tile, coping, and modern designs. Complete renovation services that transform your backyard.

cards.title: Equipment Sales & Repair
cards.description: Certified warranty center for major manufacturers. Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — we diagnose fast and stock quality parts on-site.

cards.title: Custom Pavers
cards.description: Walkways, patios, and pool surrounds with unlimited design options. Durable, beautiful paver installations that elevate your entire outdoor space.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Fully custom outdoor kitchen design and construction. From built-in grills to countertops and bars — we create your dream entertaining space.

cards.title: Grills & Accessories
cards.description: Wide selection of grill styles with expert guidance. Home of the famous EggFest and grilling classes. We'll help you find the perfect setup.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Call or fill out the form — tell us about your pool, patio, or outdoor kitchen project. We'll schedule a free on-site visit at a time that works for you.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: B.J. and the team will assess your space, discuss options, and provide honest, transparent pricing. No pressure, no hidden fees — just straight talk.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Our experienced crew handles the work with care and professionalism. We don't leave until you love the result. That's been our promise for 27 years.

about.label: Why Polk County Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated Since '99 — B.J. Mannix Still Leads Every Project
about.description: What started as a one-man operation in 1999 has grown into Polk County's go-to outdoor living company. But one thing hasn't changed: B.J. Mannix is still hands-on with every project. As a Florida State Certified Contractor and BBB Accredited business since 2001, we've built our reputation on fair pricing, honest work, and treating every customer like a neighbor. Nothing is more satisfying than a customer who loves the work we do and tells their friends.

features.title: 27 Years, Same Owner
features.description: B.J. Mannix has led this company since day one. You get owner-level attention on every single project — not a random subcontractor.

features.title: Fair, Transparent Pricing
features.description: No bait-and-switch. No surprise add-ons. We give you an honest quote upfront and stick to it. That's how we've kept customers for decades.

features.title: Full-Service Outdoor Living
features.description: Pools, pavers, outdoor kitchens, grills — one trusted team handles it all. Fewer headaches, better results, and a single point of contact.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises. Ever.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets an honest, upfront quote. We've built 27 years of trust on transparent pricing — no hidden fees, no bait-and-switch.

guarantee.headline: Our "Neighbor-to-Neighbor" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge. B.J. Mannix built this business on relationships, not transactions. Your satisfaction is what keeps our neighbors recommending us.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start my project?
faqs.answer: For pool maintenance, most new clients are scheduled within the week. For remodeling, outdoor kitchens, or paver projects, we'll have an on-site consultation within a few days and provide a detailed timeline during your estimate.

faqs.question: Do you service my area in Polk County?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Polk County including Winter Haven, Lakeland, Lake Wales, Bartow, Auburndale, Davenport, Haines City, and surrounding communities. If you're in Polk County, we've got you covered.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're a Florida State Certified Contractor (CPC-1458804), BBB Accredited since 2001, and carry full liability insurance. We're also a certified warranty center for major pool equipment manufacturers.

faqs.question: Can you handle both my pool and outdoor kitchen?
faqs.answer: That's exactly what makes us different. We're a full-service outdoor living company — pools, remodels, pavers, outdoor kitchens, and grills. One team, one point of contact, and everything coordinates seamlessly.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're a certified warranty center for major manufacturers and carry top brands for pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and grills. Visit our showroom in Winter Haven to see our full selection.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: This crew is outstanding!! The service was great and not a lot of loud music and playing around. Very professional.

testimonials.name: Local Homeowner
testimonials.text: Bobby did a great job finding the leak and clamping it till the plumber can put a new pipe in. Would recommend Mannix Pools to anyone needing pool service. A++++ business.

testimonials.name: Renovation Customer
testimonials.text: The team dug deeper to find and repair a problem professionally and on schedule, with excellent service and great care and professionalism.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure estimate from B.J. and the team. 27 years of Polk County trust — just honest pricing for quality outdoor living.
